comments.author: @heatherlibby4596
comments.text: Your map showed an Omani route round the tip of Mussandam which is an Omani enclave surrounded by the UAE.  The Strait of Hormuz is narrower and further east between the Iranian mainland and Hormuz Island,

replies.author: @ImpossibleTravel38
replies.text: Thanks for the insight, we really appreciate the feedback! ✈️✈️✈️
